case_title: EDWIN WOO VS. JAYME SCHERLE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR DENNIS CLARK BIRKHIMER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-30-2016 THROUGH MAR-30-2017.
